message: Update to 1.1.0 - Developer panel (renamed from Admin), secure DEV login, multi-PC activation sync via Supabase. Close all Nova windows and reopen, then click UPDATE NOW.
releaseNotes: 1.1.0 - Admin Panel renamed to Developer. bcrypt-protected DEV_USERNAME/DEV_PASSWORD. Cloud sync activations across PCs with Supabase. Approve/Reject updates cloud+local and emails School Code.
